author: rotifer-petri
description: Per-fund, per-epoch loss circuit breaker (ALPHA-001 §9). Tracks cumulative realized losses and blocks new trades if a fund loses ≥20% of epoch-start capital. Pure decision logic; DB tracking functions are side-effect isolated. Epoch resets daily at 01:00 UTC.

newLossUsdc.description: Optional: additional loss to include in threshold check

thresholdPct.description: Loss % that trips the breaker. Hard safety floor — NOT evolvable.

transparency.note: checkCircuitBreaker() is pure. thresholdPct is a HARD SAFETY FLOOR — funds must not self-tune their own safety limits via evolution. Epoch reset at 01:00 UTC daily cron.
